check.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$paths=@('HKLM:\Software\Adobe\Acrobat Reader\DC\Installer','HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Adobe\Acrobat Reader\DC\Installer'); $ok=$true; foreach ($p in $paths) { $v=(Get-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name 'DisableMaintenance' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).DisableMaintenance; if ($v -ne 1) { $ok=$false } }; if ($ok) { 'Compliant' }"

candidate_check.description: Adobe Reader DC must disable the Adobe Repair Installation.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the following registry configuration:

Utilizing the Registry Editor, navigate to the following: 

For 32 bit:
HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Adobe\Acrobat Reader\DC\Installer

For 64 bit:
HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Adobe\Acrobat Reader\DC\Installer

Value Name: DisableMaintenance
Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 1

If the value for DisableMaintenance is not set to “1” and Type configured to REG_DWORD or does not exist, then this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
"Configure the following registry value:

For 32 bit:
Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \Software\Adobe\Acrobat Reader\DC\Installer 

For 64 bit:
Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Adobe\Acrobat Reader\DC\Installer

Value Name: DisableMaintenance
Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 1
title: Adobe Reader DC must disable the Adobe Repair Installation.
